case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM $4,777.12 PRINCIPAL, $1,206.51 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,983.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2012
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DECLARATION RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 5/8/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED MAY-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU T PHAM AKA CHAU PHAM
